_comment: Edit this file to change capture settings. All fields are optional; sensible defaults are used if a field is missing or this file is absent.
_model_comment: model_path: local NNArchive (.tar.xz) or blob, relative to this file. model: Luxonis model zoo ID (used only if model_path is empty). Both enable SpatialDetectionNetwork (AI + stereo depth → X/Y/Z per detection).
_depth_comment: depth_enabled shows the stereo disparity colourmap in a second window. depth_lower_mm / depth_upper_mm clamp the depth range used for spatial coordinates. bb_scale controls what fraction of each bounding box is sampled for depth (0.5 = inner 50%).
